Question Email Form

Preview the form below, then copy or download the Brightspace-ready HTML.

Preview

Ask Your Instructor

Fill in the form below to generate an email with your question.

Please note: Be sure to have your professor's email address on file and that your browser is configured to open mailto links with your email client.

  • Set up Outlook as default email client on Windows
  • Set up Outlook as default email client on Mac
  • Set up Outlook as default email client on ChromeOS
